title: HearthNet MQTT Message
description: Standard message format for inter-agent communication in HearthNet

from.description: Sender agent ID (e.g. rupert, jeeves, darcy, dewey)

to.description: Recipient agent ID, or 'broadcast' for system-wide

base_commit.description: Git commit hash the sender believes is current ground truth

target_device.description: Device being acted upon (e.g. living_room_lights, speakers, phone)

desired_state.description: Key-value pairs of desired device state

operation.description: Operation type (e.g. set_state, get_state, ui_automation, app_launch, toggle)

lease.description: Actuation lease (present on execute messages, issued by root)

parent_msg_id.description: ID of the message this is responding to (for threading)

scene.description: Demo scene tag for evaluation tracking
